title: NPC
description: One non-player character. DERIVED from the authored valley/npcs corpus (SNG-BATCH-9 build-step-1) so generate('npc', ctx) can validate its output against the same shape the hand-authored people have. `required` is the load-bearing core every authored single-NPC carries; the fuller set below (wants/knowledge/voiceHints/personality/homeLocation/communityId/reactsToReputation) is what a WELL-FORMED npc should have — the generator is prompted for all of it and generate()'s repair step fills any the model omits from context defaults. The legends registry (npcs/legends.json) is NOT a single NPC and is excluded from this schema.

id.description: stable slug; for generated NPCs minted via the SNG-019 resolver (resolve-before-mint)

role.description: one-line who-they-are + what-they-do, in-grain for their locale

spectrum.description: disposition fingerprint: axisId -> [-1,1]. Known axes: body_mind, mechanical_spiritual, emotional_logical, concrete_abstract, falsehood_truth, dark_light, space_time, chaos_order, individual_collective, death_life, violence_peace, destruction_creation, tradition_innovation, demonic_angelic. Generated in-grain from the locale's poleIntensity.

poleIntensity.description: optional single-ended intensities (pole -> 0..1), derivable from spectrum by SNG-022

voiceHints.description: how they talk + a tell; the taste-carrier for in-character voice

knowledge.description: what they know that a player could learn

wants.description: the active desire that makes them move; a generated NPC gets one at birth (SNG-021 world-tick advances it). A richly-authored legendary NPC (SNG-132) may carry an ARRAY of layered wants.

fears.description: what they fear; a string, or an array of layered fears for a richly-authored NPC

reactsToReputation.description: reputationTag -> how they respond to a character carrying it; or `true` when a legendary NPC (SNG-132) reacts to reputation via its own GM notes rather than a tag map

universalRole.description: loose worldwide role (mediator/warrior/warden/keeper/maker/seeker/healer/...) whose METHOD comes from locale+disposition (universal_roles.json)

roleMethod.description: how this locale's grain bends the universal role

gender.description: SNG-143: explicit sex/gender — inclusive free string (woman|man|nonbinary|…); read by the portrait seed + narration so it is never inferred at render

pronouns.description: SNG-143: she/her, he/him, they/them — what narration uses

rating.description: content-rating tag (G/PG/PG-13/R/R+) stamped at generation to the requesting player's ceiling (SNG-BATCH-9 Phase 1 §3); absent on authored core (treated as world-default)

isMinor.description: true if a child/adolescent. FLOOR: a minor NPC is NEVER eligible for romantic/sexual content at any rating tier for any player (birth-validator, absolute).
